default.value: Single-user middleware requirement: Auto-provide default user ID for all API requests. No authentication needed. System defaults to 'single-user' context. Components: middleware layer, user context manager, API interceptor. No external auth deps. Security: simplified for single-user mode.

Enhanced dual Claude system with SPARC (Specification, Pseudocode, Architecture, Refinement, Completion), TDD (Test-Driven Development), and NLD (Neuro Learning Development) integration. Key components: 1) Dual Claude instances for parallel processing, 2) SPARC methodology implementation, 3) TDD workflow automation, 4) NLD pattern learning system, 5) Real-time coordination between instances
